title: 1 step DFU - Settings/Update tab both on the lates
scenario: Settings > SW Update shows "Up to date" when app, Osprey device, EB, and CC are on latest firmware
steps: 1. Ensure the Poly Studio Mobile app, Osprey device, Embedded Bluetooth (EB), and Connect Client (CC) are all on the latest firmware versions.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your mobile device.
3. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to the Home screen.
4. Tap on Settings (gear icon) from the navigation menu.
5. Tap on SW Update (Software Update) within the Settings menu.
6. Observe the status message displayed on the SW Update screen.
expected: The SW Update screen displays "Up to date" with no update available.
